summary: Package fetches payload from anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket
details: dist/index.js line 14 contains a fetch() call to https://pub-0dc3e1677e894f07bbea11b17a29e032.r2.dev together with references to process.platform and process.versions for OS/runtime fingerprinting. Anonymous Cloudflare R2 buckets (pub-*.r2.dev) are documented payload-distribution infrastructure used by recent npm-cluster compromises to deliver platform-native binaries with no version pinning, no hash verification, and no relation to any declared publisher domain. The host has no legitimate use case for shipping executable content to an installer, and the surrounding fingerprinting calls indicate the fetch is selecting platform-specific payloads. Installing or loading this package will pull attacker-controlled bytes from a mutable anonymous endpoint onto the installer's machine.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
